changeSet.author: openelis-bioanalytical
changeSet.comment: Add permission_level column for action-level access control

changeSet.author: openelis-bioanalytical

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page_allowed_roles WHERE notebook_page_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook_page WHERE page_order = 1 AND notebook_id IN (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title LIKE '%Bioanalytical%')) AND role = 'Bioanalytical Sample Receiver'

changeSet.comment: Sample Receiver can register/import samples on PAGE 1

update.where: notebook_page_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook_page WHERE page_order = 1 AND notebook_id IN (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title LIKE '%Bioanalytical%')) AND role = 'Bioanalytical Sample Receiver'

changeSet.author: openelis-bioanalytical

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page_allowed_roles WHERE notebook_page_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook_page WHERE page_order = 1 AND notebook_id IN (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title LIKE '%Bioanalytical%')) AND role = 'Bioanalytical Chemical Analyst'

changeSet.comment: Chemical Analyst can update sample fields on PAGE 1

update.where: notebook_page_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook_page WHERE page_order = 1 AND notebook_id IN (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title LIKE '%Bioanalytical%')) AND role = 'Bioanalytical Chemical Analyst'

changeSet.author: openelis-bioanalytical

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page_allowed_roles WHERE notebook_page_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook_page WHERE page_order = 1 AND notebook_id IN (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title LIKE '%Bioanalytical%')) AND role = 'Bioanalytical Pharmacist'

changeSet.comment: Pharmacist can update sample fields on PAGE 1

update.where: notebook_page_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook_page WHERE page_order = 1 AND notebook_id IN (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title LIKE '%Bioanalytical%')) AND role = 'Bioanalytical Pharmacist'

changeSet.comment: Lab Supervisor has full control on PAGE 1

update.where: notebook_page_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook_page WHERE page_order = 1 AND notebook_id IN (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title LIKE '%Bioanalytical%')) AND role = 'Bioanalytical Lab Supervisor'

changeSet.comment: Study Director has read-only access on PAGE 1

changeSet.comment: Chemical Analyst has limited access on PAGE 4 (view reports, no release)

update.where: notebook_page_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook_page WHERE page_order = 4 AND notebook_id IN (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title LIKE '%Bioanalytical%')) AND role = 'Bioanalytical Chemical Analyst'

changeSet.comment: Pharmacist has full control on PAGE 4

changeSet.comment: Researcher has project-specific access on PAGE 4

update.where: notebook_page_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook_page WHERE page_order = 4 AND notebook_id IN (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title LIKE '%Bioanalytical%')) AND role = 'Bioanalytical Researcher'

changeSet.comment: Data Manager has full analytics access on PAGE 4

changeSet.comment: Sample Receiver has restricted access on PAGE 5

update.where: notebook_page_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook_page WHERE page_order = 5 AND notebook_id IN (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title LIKE '%Bioanalytical%')) AND role = 'Bioanalytical Sample Receiver'

changeSet.comment: Lab Supervisor can approve archiving on PAGE 5

update.where: notebook_page_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook_page WHERE page_order = 5 AND notebook_id IN (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title LIKE '%Bioanalytical%')) AND role = 'Bioanalytical Lab Supervisor'

changeSet.comment: Study Director can approve archiving on PAGE 5

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page_allowed_roles WHERE notebook_page_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook_page WHERE page_order = 5 AND notebook_id IN (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title LIKE '%Bioanalytical%')) AND role = 'Bioanalytical QA Officer'

changeSet.comment: QA Officer has restricted access on PAGE 5
